title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
